nasb.text: The woman conceived and bore a son; and when she saw that he was beautiful, she hid him for three months.

esv.text: The woman conceived and bore a son, and when she saw that he was a fine child, she hid him three months.

cnv.text: 那女人懷孕，生了一個兒子；見他俊美，就把他藏了三個月。

ccb.text: 那女子怀孕，生了一个男婴。她看见孩子可爱，就把他藏了三个月。
